failures: Fee extraction only included a lump sum for the base price and did not clearly itemize additional fees except for upsells: 'potential additional fee for the one flight of stairs... the long carry at the destination might also incur a slight charge.' This did not provide clear, correct itemization as required.

Friction handling was inadequate as the caller did not push back effectively against the pressure to make a decision quickly, evidenced by, 'If you're interested, I really recommend that you make a decision within the next **10 minutes** to lock in this rate, as I can’t hold it much longer.'
